narrative:
Huber Heights 3-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 816 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
